text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As per yearly tradition, it's time for Tracen's summer camp. The
change of scenery has Bamboo fired up more than ever.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Get that blood boiling for an extra red-hot step ten! Feel that summer heat and ruuun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Haaah... So, what do you think of those sand sprints?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! Sand takes more leg strength to run than normal tracks, but it's
nice not having to worry so much about my nails.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Those two—aren't they the ones from the arcade that one
time?

text_block_list.name: Arcade Duo
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ At this pace, we'll smash through the assignment early.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We did plenty of training, so I say we wrap up and have some
fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Heh. Breaktime is important too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I've still got plenty of energy for another lap, though!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? They still haven't come back?

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: No... I've been messaging them, but they haven't replied.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hrmmm, I've got a bad feeling about this! Did they say anything
about where they were going?

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Not really... But this afternoon, I saw a man start a conversation with
them. He was saying he could show them around some fun places in
the area...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: THAT'S OUR PERP!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured, the disciplinary committee is here to keep students safe!
I'll go save them!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Wait! We should tell an adult first!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to get a trainer, right? Um, I think Bamboo's trainer
was...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Umm... Are you sure this is okay?

text_block_list.name: Shallow Man
text_block_list.text: It's fiiine. No one'll notice if you're back a bit late.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Stop right there! I know what you're up to!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And you two—you're not getting off with a warning this time! C'mon,
I'm taking you back!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Not the fun police... Just leave us alone!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm not here to take away your free time. It's just as important as
running, right? I know I wouldn't want to give up my kendo time...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I reconsidered a lot of stuff since last time. And now, I get why having
time to play is so essential.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But what you're doing right now is dangerous. That man could take
both racing and leisure away from you! And I can't let that happen!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
W-what we do is none of your business! We're not taking orders from
some jerk who doesn't even know us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...I'll admit, I may not know much about you or your hobbies.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But even so, deep down... I know you're just like me. You wanna run, and you wanna win!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If all you cared about was having fun, you could've quit racing. But
you didn't. You stuck it out through all the rigorous training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Because you've both got dreams! You've got races you wanna win!
And if you invite trouble here, all the work you've done'll go down
the drain...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I won't ever let that happen!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Chairman...

text_block_list.name: Shallow Man
text_block_list.text:
Blegh, am I watching a kid's show or something? That motivational
sports crap was dumb, even for a toddler.

text_block_list.name: Shallow Man
text_block_list.text:
These little ladies here already said they'd rather be out having fun.
C'mon, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! Stop!

text_block_list.name: Shallow Man
text_block_list.text: Let go! ...Damn it, you made me drop everything!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
What are all these notes? "Tracen Elites Ditch Camp for Local
Nightlife"?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It looks like his phone's been recording everything you said... I see
how it is. You're some tabloid jerk trying to stir up trouble!

text_block_list.name: Shallow Man
text_block_list.text: You brat... Give that back!

text_block_list.name: Policeman
text_block_list.text: Put your hands up! This is the police!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as the man starts to lunge at Bamboo for the phone, our shouts
startle him just long enough for the officer to grab him. I'm so glad we
made it in time...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! And a police officer?
choice_data_list: A student told me you three were in danger.
A student told me you three were in danger.

text_block_list.name: Policeman
text_block_list.text: I'm going to take this man in for questioning. ...And you are gonna have a lot to answer for at the station!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: I-I was so scared!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's okay now! Discipline and order have been restored!
choice_data_list: Oh, this most certainly is not okay!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
I was worried sick! I thought something
happened to you!

I was worried sick! I thought something
happened to you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, I-I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Heh, who's the rule-breaker now?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sh-shut up! I wouldn't be out here if you hadn't—

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: It's fine, we get it. We messed up bad, and you really were just trying to help us.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think we learned our lesson with this one. And, uh... you're not
exactly wrong... We do have dreams.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear it! Let's all keep running strong and steady towards
those goals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the close call, the rule-breaking pair amend their ways.
Everyone puts their heart and soul into training—and into enjoying
the festival and fireworks afterwards!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm! Y'know what? "Work hard, play hard" really is the way to go!
choice_data_list: You've gotta enjoy your downtime to the max!
You've gotta enjoy your downtime to the max!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'll uphold all the rules perfectly, get plenty of rest and
relaxation, and then I'll win all my races when we get home from
camp!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But, uh... If I do anything dumb like the other night, don't hesitate to
put me back on track.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Got it?! I'm looking forward to LOTS more red-hot training with you!
